data.title: Secure Authentication
data.description: Spotify employs OAuth 2.0 for secure user authentication and authorization.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes token-based access to protect user data and services.

data.title: Encryption Protocols
data.description: Strong encryption is applied to protect data in transit and at rest.
data.technical_spec: TLS/SSL for network traffic encryption and AES for data protection.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Regular third-party security audits are conducted to identify potential vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Penetration testing and vulnerability scanning are part of routine checks.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Infrastructure is fortified against Distributed Denial of Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Leverage cloud-based DDoS protection services like Cloudflare.

data.title: Intrusion Detection and Prevention
data.description: Systems are continuously monitored to detect and respond to suspicious activities.
data.technical_spec: AI-driven IDP systems analyze traffic patterns and enforce threat mitigation.
